calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Continued To Apr-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-545243, CGC-15-548049 WITH CASE CGC-15-548391
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cathy Mosbrucker, Esq. (415-398-9880) for Plaintiff in CGC-15-545243.
Abigail Lighthart, Esq. (415-546-7500) for Defendants MARINER ISLAND INVESTORS, GROSVENOR PROPERTIES LTD in all cases, CGC-15-545243, CGC-15-548391 , CGC-15-548049.

Parties present a stipulation in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MARINER ISLAND INVESTORS, GROSVENOR PROPERTIES LTD MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-545243, CGC-15-548391 WITH CASE CGC-15-548049 is GRANTED, Actions are consolidated for all purposes. Moving party prepare order. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details) 545243 is the lead case. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Cases
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS MARINERS ISLAND INVESTORS and GROSVENOR PROPERTIES, LTD's Motion To Consolidate Cases IS OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for March 8, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
